creator: jmd@freebsd.org
text:
Can you raise this as an issue with the kms-drm project "upstream" (https://github.com/FreeBSDDesktop/kms-drm )? Since this is not an issue with the port itself but the kms-drm, that would be the right location.

I believe we've seen a few of these audio issues before, so hopefully somebody there may be able to help you! :-)
